parameters.name: NameMatchType
parameters.description:
The match pattern for searching SaaS domain names. The default value is \`exact\`.

- **prefix**: Prefix match.

- **suffix**: Suffix match.

- **exact**: Exact match.

- **fuzzy**: Fuzzy match.

parameters.name: PageNumber
parameters.description: The page number. Pages start from 1. The default value is 1.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: The number of entries per page. The default value is 100. The maximum value is 500.

parameters.name: RecordId
parameters.description: The ID of the attached record. Obtain this ID by calling the [ListRecords](~~2850265~~) operation.

parameters.name: SiteId
parameters.description: The site ID. Obtain this ID by calling the [ListSites](~~2850189~~) operation.

parameters.name: Status
parameters.description:
The status of the SaaS domain name.

- **pending**: Pending validation.

- **active**: Active.

- **conflicted**: Conflicted.

- **offline**: Offline.
